instructions.readAloud: Please read the sentences as they appear on the screen. Read clearly and naturally.
instructions.repeats: Please repeat each sentence that you hear. You will hear the sentence only once.
instructions.shortAnswer: You will hear a question. Please give a simple and short answer. Often just one or a few words is enough.
instructions.sentenceBuilds: You will hear three phrases. Please rearrange them to make a sentence. Say the sentence clearly.
instructions.storyRetelling: You will hear a brief story. The story will be spoken once. When you hear the beep, please retell the story in your own words.
instructions.openQuestions: You will hear a question. Please answer the question and explain your reasons.
